name: playground-constellation
playground:description: A live big-screen constellation of Polkadot Playground activity for the Web3 Summit Developer Lab.

pnpm._comment_overrides: @polkadot-api/json-rpc-provider: upstream packaging-bug workaround (mirrors product-sdk's monorepo). @novasamatech/host-api*: host-api is the wire protocol shared with the Polkadot Desktop host; the latest Desktop bundles 0.8.4, so we pin the whole 0.8.x line to the latest stable patch (0.8.10) — 0.8.x releases are mutually wire-compatible (0.8.4 changed the handshake; everything 0.8.4+ is the post-change group). product-sdk-host 0.11 requires host-api ^0.8.9, so 0.8.10 is the latest patch that satisfies it without crossing the 0.9.x line. Don't cross to 0.9.x until Desktop does. (The old 0.8.6 pin was for the product-sdk-host 0.7.x line.)
